theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

narrative.summary: Jupiter: 정량 종합 55점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 60 / 중기 66 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 정상
overheat.guidance: 진입 OK. 종합 점수가 좋다면 매수 검토.

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 2개 시그널 합류 — 일봉 200MA, Swing High. 현재가 대비 +5.0% 위치. T1 $0.216 (R:R 1.9), T2 $0.3017 (R:R 8.5)
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $0.1909 아래 손절가 $0.1778 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

multi_tf.note: TF가 align 안 됨 — conviction 낮음, 보수적 사이징.

top_news.title: McKesson Unit Prices $2.25 Billion Leveraged Loan Ahead of IPO
top_news.summary: A $2.25 billion leveraged loan for McKesson Corp.’s medical-surgical unit priced on Wednesday, ahead of its planned initial public offering.

top_news.title: TickPick CEO on Soaring Prices for NBA Finals
top_news.summary: Brett Goldberg, Co-CEO and Co-Founder of TickPick, joined the program to discuss the current state of the ticket market as the NBA Finals between the Knicks and Spurs begin. He highlighted the contrasting behaviors in the secondary ticket market, noting that diehard fans are willing to pay premium prices to secure seats at major events, while some season ticket holders may choose to sell their tickets to make a profit. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: SpaceX Seeks $75 Billion in Record IPO to Fund AI, Launch
top_news.summary: SpaceX is seeking to raise $75 billion in an initial public offering that would be the biggest of all time, as Elon Musk’s rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company targets a historic debut that could clear a path for more mega-listings.

top_news.title: Oil Holds Three-Day Gain as Iran-US Clashes Lower Deal Prospects
top_news.summary: Oil slipped after three days of gains as the US and Iran exchanged strikes, threatening the prospects of a peace deal that would reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

top_news.title: Nomura's Nanavati on Asia M&A Momentum, Strategy
top_news.summary: Nomura Head of Investment Banking for Asia ex-Japan Jwalant Nanavati shares his perspective on how landmark listings like SpaceX could shape the appetite for mergers and acquisitions across Asia and beyond. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'Nomura Investment Forum Asia' in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: New Fed Beige Book Survey Shows Inflation Up Across Most Districts, Steady Employment
top_news.summary: Stuart Paul, US and Canada economist for Bloomberg Economics, and Tom Keene, co-host of Bloomberg Surveillance, broke down the information out of the Fed's Beige Book Survey as the Fed reported inflation up across most districts, with costs rising due to conflict with Iran.  On the other side, employment remained steady.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: QXO Gets Better Terms on Buyout Debt After Strong Demand
top_news.summary: QXO Building Products Inc. saw terms improve on a $6 billion financing package to fund its purchase of rival TopBuild Corp., which attracted more than three times the amount of demand from investors.

top_news.title: OpenAI y Anthropic alistan sus OPI que podrían redefinir el mercado de la inteligencia artificial
top_news.summary: Dos grandes de la IA tienen la mirada puesta en los mercados bursátiles, pero algunos se preguntan si la salida a bolsa de SpaceX, prevista para junio, les va a robar el protagonismo.

top_news.title: Inotiv, Breeder of Laboratory Animals, Files For Bankruptcy
top_news.summary: Inotiv Inc., which breeds dogs and imports monkeys that are used in drug experiments, filed for bankruptcy in part on what it blamed are tighter rules on its US canine farm and tariffs on non-human primates raised in China.

top_news.title: Bill Ackman’s Pershing Square to Exit Universal Music Stake
top_news.summary: Bill Ackman is looking to sell his stake in Universal Music Group NV just days after the Amsterdam-listed company rejected a takeover bid by the hedge fund billionaire.
